calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-26-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for short cause trial/Prove Up Hearing. Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Daniel Bornstein, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Solon Castillo.
Witness Solon Castillo sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant.
Kim Shindel, Esq., appearing on behalf of Respondent, not present in court.
Brian Murphy, Esq., appearing with Respondent's counsel.
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
Court returns Plaintiff's exhibits to counsel.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 125 Guerrero Street #1, San Francisco, California 94103, San Francisco County.

Damages $0.00
Holdover damages $676.00
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $240.00
for a Total Judgment of $916.00

Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-26-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-22-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 7
Judge Pro Tem: Joshua Klipp, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Solon Castillo is present.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein for the plaintiff.
Defendant Scott Pickett is present.
Attorney Kimberly Shindel appearing for defendant in full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of October 26, 2015 remains on calendar. (501/jpt)
